description: Phase 1 protected-path baseline. git blob SHA-1 (git hash-object) per file at the committed HEAD when the daily integrity check was set up. The 7am check compares these against the current GitHub HEAD of each repo. Any change = drift to flag.
note_revision: Updated 2026-06-11: autonomous push enabled (PROJECT_STATE doc commit). Protected blobs UNCHANGED. fortress main=a3a0b70, trading master=47c6a6b. Note: AUTO_PUSH now live — the bot may push SI auto-fix commits to canonical; the 7am check baseline-vs-HEAD diff will surface them.
